Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Did you know this hot spring is open for guys at certain times and girls at others?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}No way, really? So there's a chance it could switch to girls-only while we're still in here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But even if that happens, it wouldn't be on us, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}That's true. Something like that actually happening wouldn't be our fault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_003_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This might blow up in our faces.

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 0 25 25}Even still, can't help but think maybe fate wants us to be here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Anyway, I was just asking. Not like I'm being serious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...Hey, isn't it getting kinda hot in here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei and Ryoji seem[n]to be acting strange...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So, what time does this hot spring change from guys-only to girls-only, Junpei?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Uh, I'm not sure. I didn't bother to check. Right, Ryoji-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Right? It could happen at any moment, couldn't it, Junpei-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You morons. So that's why we came at such a strange time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hahaha, calm down, man. We're just joking! I mean, yeah, we are here at a weird hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But don't worry about it. I doubt any girls would come out here this la—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}What!? Someone's here! Oh man, what're we gonna do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Probably just another guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}We can say we didn't know, that it's all just a misunderstanding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Wow! This hot spring is huge![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Wow, you're right. It's as big as a swimming pool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}So this is an outdoor hot spring. Unfortunately, its therapeutic benefits have no effect on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Shiiit, it's them! What're they doing here this late?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Yes! Yukari-san and Fuuka-san!? This is my lucky ni—[cr][n]{f 1 2 160}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Shut up, you dumbass! They'll hear you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Who's that!? Is someone there!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}What's wrong, Yukari? Did you hear something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Mitsuru's here, too!? Oh, man. There's no way she'll see this as just a "misunderstanding"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Uh, you don't think she'd get us expelled for this, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Like, it was guys-only when we got here. It's not like we planned this. We were just goofing around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You expect her to buy that? No, if she finds us, then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Yeah, I think I did hear something. Fuuka, could you check over there?[n]{f 1 1}
